column1:
When disabled, Magento keeps its default street address labels
and validation behavior.
column2:
When disabled, Magento keeps its default street address labels

column1:
Enable to apply custom street line labels and required settings
on the storefront.
column2:
Enable to apply custom street line labels and required settings

column1:
Define the label for each street address line.
Configure the number of street lines under Stores > Configuration > Customers >
Customer Configuration > Name and Address Options.
column2:
Define the label for each street address line.
Configure the number of street lines under Stores > Configuration > Customers >
Customer Configuration > Name and Address Options.

column1: Leave empty to keep the default Magento label.
column2: Leave empty to keep the default Magento label.

column1:
Line 1 is always required by Magento.
Use these settings to mark additional street lines as required.
Each option is ignored when the store is configured to show fewer street address lines
than the line number.
column2:
Line 1 is always required by Magento.
Use these settings to mark additional street lines as required.
Each option is ignored when the store is configured to show fewer street address lines
than the line number.

column1: Ignored when the store is configured to show fewer than 2 street address lines.
column2: Ignored when the store is configured to show fewer than 2 street address lines.

column1: Ignored when the store is configured to show fewer than 3 street address lines.
column2: Ignored when the store is configured to show fewer than 3 street address lines.

column1: Ignored when the store is configured to show fewer than 4 street address lines.
column2: Ignored when the store is configured to show fewer than 4 street address lines.
